title: Settings
description: Manage shop address, payments, fulfillment, storefront status, and account details.

status.templateUnavailable: That storefront is no longer available.

handle.patternHint: Use 3–63 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
handle.checkFailed: Could not check availability. Try again.

dialog.changeAddressDescription: {currentHost} will stop working for this shop. You will be redirected to {nextHost}.

shop.intro: Public identity for customers and the hostname used by staff.
shop.detailsDescription: Name and subdomain for this merchant shop.
shop.name: Shop name
shop.addressChangeDescription: The current subdomain stops resolving and this dashboard moves to the new address after you save.

preferences.intro: Browser and checkout defaults for day-to-day work.
preferences.dashboardDescription: Stored in this browser for the current shop.
preferences.launchDescription: Show the floating setup assistant on Overview.
preferences.commerceDescription: Currency and checkout options for this shop.
preferences.currencyHint: Storefront prices and fees use Ethiopian Birr. Multi-currency is not available yet.
preferences.fulfillmentHint: Delivery, pickup, and phone confirmation live under Fulfillment.

fulfillment.intro: How customers receive orders at checkout. Switches save immediately.
fulfillment.checkoutDescription: Control delivery, pickup, and order details collection.
fulfillment.feeHint: Applied when delivery is enabled at checkout.
fulfillment.currencyHint: Shop currency is fixed to Ethiopian Birr.
fulfillment.unavailableDescription: Try again after checkout setup is complete.

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.description: Allow customers to choose local delivery.

phoneConfirmation.label: Phone confirmation
phoneConfirmation.description: Require a phone number before checkout.

landmark.label: Delivery landmark
landmark.description: Require a nearby landmark for delivery.

storefront.intro: Control whether customers can visit your shop, and choose the storefront design.
storefront.designDescription: Starting template customers see after you publish.
storefront.designDescriptionSingle: Your shop uses the Classic storefront. Customize look and content in the editor, then publish.
storefront.noneDescription: Storefront selection will be available after templates are seeded.
storefront.liveDescription: Customers can browse and order on your storefront.
storefront.pausedDescription: Customers cannot open the live shop until you publish again. Your editor draft is safe.
storefront.selectFailed: Could not switch storefront. Try again.
storefront.stylePreviewHint: Style sample only. Your real text, images, and colors are in the editor.
storefront.pauseShopDescription: Customers will see that the store is unavailable. Your draft stays saved so you can publish again anytime.
storefront.pauseShopSuccess: Shop paused. The live storefront is offline.
storefront.pauseShopFailed: Could not pause the shop. Try again.
storefront.publishHint: Publish when you are ready for customers to shop again.
storefront.publishShopFailed: Could not publish the shop. Try again.

notifications.intro: Get notified when orders, payments, and other shop events happen.
notifications.emailDescription: Send shop event alerts to one mailbox for this shop.
notifications.emailUnavailableDescription: Email alerts aren't enabled for this environment yet. You can still use Telegram if it's available, or check back later.
notifications.changeAndSave: Change the address above and press Save.
notifications.oneInbox: One inbox for this shop. Press Save to start receiving alerts.
notifications.pauseWithoutRemoving: Pause without removing the email address.
notifications.saveBeforeTest: Save the email address before sending a test
notifications.sendTestHint: Send a test alert to this address
notifications.eventsDescription: Choose which shop events trigger email.

toast.enterEmail: Enter an email address before saving.
toast.testQueued: Test email queued. Check your inbox shortly.

eventGroups.commerceDesc: Orders, payments, and stock from your shop.

telegramPanel.description: Instant shop event alerts on Telegram.
telegramPanel.unavailableDescription: Telegram isn't enabled for this environment yet. You can still set up email if it's available, or check back later.
telegramPanel.connectFailed: Could not start Telegram connect. Try again.
telegramPanel.linkExpiredDesc: Start connect again for a new link.
telegramPanel.stillWaitingDesc: Open Telegram, tap Start, then check again.
telegramPanel.step1: We'll open Telegram with a one-time link for this shop.
telegramPanel.step2: Tap Start in the chat so we can send alerts there.
telegramPanel.step3: Come back here. The account appears when connect succeeds.
telegramPanel.headerDescription: Instant shop event alerts on Telegram. Connect staff phones as needed.
telegramPanel.eventsShared: Same events for every connected Telegram account.
telegramPanel.disconnectDesc: This account will stop receiving shop event alerts.

accountSecurity.title: Account
accountSecurity.intro: Profile and sign-in security for your dashboard login.
accountSecurity.nameHint: Shown in the sidebar and across this shop.
accountSecurity.signOutOthersHint: Ends every other session after the password changes. This device stays signed in.
accountSecurity.devicesHint: Active browsers for this account. Remove any you do not recognize.
accountSecurity.signOutFooter: Signing out a device ends its access until the next successful sign-in.
accountSecurity.signOutDesc: {device} will need to sign in again to access the dashboard.
accountSecurity.signOutDescGeneric: This device will need to sign in again.

toast.nameMin: Enter a name with at least 2 characters.
toast.profileOrigin: Profile update blocked by auth origin settings.
toast.passwordRequired: Enter your current and new password.
toast.passwordMin: New password must be at least 8 characters.
toast.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
toast.passwordOrigin: Password change blocked by auth origin settings.
toast.passwordUpdatedOthers: Password updated. Other devices were signed out.
toast.cannotRevokeCurrent: You cannot sign out this device from here.
toast.revokeOrigin: Revoke blocked by auth origin settings.
toast.revokeFailed: Could not sign out that session.
toast.sessionsOrigin: Session list blocked by auth origin settings. Restart platform-api after updating trusted origins.
toast.revokeOthersFailed: Could not sign out other sessions.

accountSecurity.signOutOthersDesc: {count} other session(s) will be signed out. This device stays signed in.

payments.intro: Choose how customers pay when they order from your shop.
payments.loadError: Could not load payment settings. Try again.

cod.title: Cash on delivery
cod.description: Customers pay when their order is delivered or picked up.
cod.hint: Turn delivery and pickup on or off under Fulfillment.

online.title: Pay online
online.description: Customers pay with card or mobile money at checkout. Money goes to your Chapa account.
online.offerOnHint: Shoppers can choose online payment at checkout.
online.offerOffHint: Connected, but hidden at checkout until you turn this on.
online.connectHint: Link the Chapa account where you want customer payments to arrive.
online.updateHint: Paste a new secret key only if you need to replace the current one.
online.step1: Open your Chapa dashboard and copy your secret key.
online.step3: Turn on “Show on your storefront” when you are ready.
online.secretHint: We check the key with Chapa and never show it again in full.
online.helpBody: No account yet, not sure how to get a key, or prefer we handle it? Contact support. We can set up Chapa for you or show you how to connect it.
online.helpBodyConnected: Questions about your connection, a new key, or payouts? Support can help without you digging through Chapa alone.
online.disconnectHint: Removes online payment from your shop.
online.disconnectDescription: Customers will only see cash on delivery until you connect again. Orders already placed are not affected.
